channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Flytipped furniture behind shops Kempe road, 16th April
item.description:
Flytipped furniture and household items behind shops Kempe road near drive way.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Kempe Road, Enfield
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti on wall, 16th April
item.description:
Another one. Done last night. Corner of Lowth Road

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Coldharbour Lane, Loughborough Junction, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bush overhang, 16th April
item.description:
Bush obscures bus viewing and it’s a request stop! Bus went straight past.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Pickhurst Lane, Hayes, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Deceased fox, 16th April
item.description:
A fox which potentially has been hit by a car lays deceased by a tree.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): St Andrew's Road, Temple Fortune, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Litter, 16th April
item.description:
Bundle of litter on the corner of Blandford Road, by the curb and opposite No 1 ///occurs.audio.vouch

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Blandford Road, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bed with Mattress and other stuff dumped beside Telegraph pole, 16th April
item.description:
AGAIN AND AGAIN ANOTHER Bed with Mattress and other stuff dumped beside Telegraph pole, on corner of Elfrida Crescent and Longdown. Mattress keeps ending up in the road and is very dangerous to drivers needs to be cleared URGENTLY ASAP.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Elfrida Crescent, Southend, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dismantled furniture on the pavement, 16th April
item.description:
Items often left here

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Alkham Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bin bags and furniture, 16th April
item.description:
Open bin bags and furniture left. There is also rubbish at the top end of Floyd Road towards the station which is a weekly occurrence. Makes walking my dog a nightmare trying to dodge the rubbish left everywhere alone this road
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Floyd Road, Charlton
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Big pothole in Beckenham Place Park, 16th April
item.description:
Pothole can cause someone to break their ankle or fall

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Beckenham Place Park, Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti on wall, 16th April
item.description:
2 more tags put on wall last night.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 20, Coldharbour Lane, Loughborough Junction, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dismantled furniture and garden chairs on the walkway, 16th April
item.description:
A frequent place for dumping furniture

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Alkham Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipping on verge of Recreation Ground, 16th April
item.description:
Noticed this pile had appeared this morning (16/4)

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Spring Hill, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti on wLl, 16th April
item.description:
Large tag put there last night

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 50, Coldharbour Lane, Loughborough Junction, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dog poo on balance logs, 16th April
item.description:
Dog poo on the balance logs in the fitness area on Well St Common - Church Crescent side

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Groombridge Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipped load of rubble, 16th April
item.description:
Huge bag of ro=ubbble/branches in road causing hazard - I reported it earlier but put the marker in the wrong place on map - it's Rochester Way/Wriclemarsh road - not on A2

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Wricklemarsh Road, Kidbrooke
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Damage to grass verge, 16th April
item.description:
Outside 88 Welling way. Needs grass reseeding as damaged by delivery vans.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 106, Welling Way, Falconwood, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped mattress, 16th April
item.description:
Second time reporting this, first time was 3 or 4 weeks ago

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Congo Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pavement parking again, 16th April
item.description:
Two cars pavement parked, all wheels on pavement, totally blocking access for people
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Redfern Road, Catford South, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: A wardrobe broken up, 16th April
item.description:
A Wardrobe has been dumped and has sharp metal parts

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Frobisher Road, Slade Green, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Items accumulating at end of drive/road, 16th April
item.description:
Items left by habitants of 1 Holden Mews accumulating at end of road, onto South spring. Items are growing in amount and getting blown into road and encroaching on neighbouring property.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Southspring, Avery Hill
Report on FixMyStreet
